description_long: This object is a small, modern potted plant arrangement featuring three distinct succulent varieties. The pot is a simple, faceted cylinder with a matte white or light gray finish, filled with a visible layer of small, multicolored pebbles on the surface. The succulents include a rosette-shaped Echeveria, a spiky Haworthia, and a taller, oval-leaved Crassula, all rendered in soft green hues with subtle pinkish highlights on the leaf edges. The plants are densely packed, giving the arrangement a lush and full appearance. The overall look is clean and contemporary, suitable for decorative use in urban environments. No visible branding, labels, or additional ornamentation are present on the pot.
description: A modern, faceted white pot filled with three types of green succulents and decorative pebbles, creating a lush and stylish arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows all three succulents clearly, with the rosette and spiky varieties most prominent and the oval-leaved plant rising behind.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the rosette succulent in the foreground, with the spiky and oval-leaved plants slightly behind and to the sides.
description_view_2: The oval-leaved succulent dominates this view, with the rosette and spiky plants partially obscured behind it.
description_view_3: The spiky succulent is most visible on the right, with the oval-leaved plant extending upward and the rosette partially hidden.
